data.title: Move Over Dogecoin, Shiba Inu: AI Meme Coin GOAT Prints Over $3 Million In Profit For Whale Trader
data.description: Whale activity surrounding the AI-created GOAT meme coin is drawing attention in the crypto community, erasing a short-lived dip in Monday trading.

data.title: CVS Health Preannounces Large Earnings Miss, But Analysts Stay Bullish On Long-Term Recovery
data.description: CVS Health Corp (NYSE: CVS) preannounces earnings miss for Q3. Analysts maintain ratings after CEO change.

data.title: AMD To Benefit From AI 'Competitive Arms Race': Goldman Sachs
data.description: Analysts highlight sustained growth in AI infrastructure spending across industries as a key factor in the firm's Buy rating on AMD.

data.title: Disney's Leadership Shift: James Gorman Named As Chairman, CEO Search Underway
data.description: Disney appoints Morgan Stanley's James Gorman as Chairman of the Board, taking over from Mark Parker on Jan 2, 2025. Gorman to depart MS on Dec 31, 2024.
